notes: Unresolvable district scopes (no queryable official boundary): COUNTY_COUNCIL. Contests/measures scoped to them are hidden rather than shown to the wrong voters.

measures.jurisdiction: Mason County Fire Protection District No. 12
measures.title: Emergency Medical Services Levy Renewal
measures.what_it_does: Renews a six-year EMS levy for the cross-county fire district.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: General Obligation Bonds for Headquarters Fire Station
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes general obligation bonds over 25 years to replace the headquarters fire station.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.jurisdiction: Grays Harbor County Fire Protection District No. 7
measures.title: Ambulance Maintenance and Operations Excess Levy
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes a four-year excess levy for ambulance maintenance and operations.
measures.cost_line: $200,000 per year, approximately $0.45 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.
